intake_log.raw_input: Her Reset Button: 60 Minutes to Yourself a workshop for the mom who's hitting the decision fatigue wall and just needs a break. I'll hold your brain and you leave with (at least) one less decision to make.

Her Reset Button: Income After AI working in tech is like riding a roller coaster through the wild west today. Jobs come as fast as they go and as long as you rely on someone else to pay the bills, it's the same old rollercoaster. Take a 60 minute break from the ups and downs and leave with a straight path to what people mean when they say, "I got rich with AI."

content.title: Her Reset Button: Income After AI
content.description: working in tech is like riding a roller coaster through the wild west today. Jobs come as fast as they go and as long as you rely on someone else to pay the bills, it's the same old rollercoaster. Take a 60 minute break from the ups and downs and leave with a straight path to what people mean when they say, "I got rich with AI."
content.transcript:
What If the Thing You're Worried About Is Actually the Thing That Sets You Free?
‚ÄčSounds familiar, right? The obstacle is the way.

‚ÄčListen.
‚ÄčYou've spent years solving problems, managing people, navigating change, and figuring things out when there wasn't a clear path forward.

‚ÄčOften while someone else stood in front of the room taking the credit, collecting the praise, and calling it leadership.

‚ÄčLeave that behind. Let that Sh*t GO!

‚ÄčInstead, let's look forward to what you do well.

‚ÄčBecause your skills, your values, your input matters.

‚ÄčMaybe more than ever.

‚ÄčWhile everyone else is counting the jobs being eliminated, I'm paying attention to the businesses being born.
‚ÄčNew industries are being born as you read this

‚ÄčNew ways for one person to create value

‚ÄčNew methods for solving problems

‚ÄčNew streams of revenue

‚ÄčAnd it's all available like low-hanging fruit for the woman who braves biting the apple.

‚ÄčThink about the people who bought Apple stock when most people thought it was a hobby computer company.

‚ÄčMost of us don't get many chances to witness the beginning of something this significant.

‚ÄčThis is one of them.

‚ÄčThe Good News
‚ÄčYou already have what you need.

‚ÄčWork ethic

‚ÄčAdaptability

‚ÄčCommunication skills

‚ÄčResilience

‚ÄčThe ability to care about people while solving real problems

‚ÄčThe future won't belong to the people with the most credentials.

‚ÄčIt belongs to the people who can:

‚ÄčIdentify a problem

‚ÄčFind an answer

‚ÄčAdapt to changing conditions

‚ÄčCommunicate that answer in a way that creates clarity for someone else

‚ÄčSkills Worth Strengthening
‚ÄčFinding what matters

‚ÄčConnecting dots

‚ÄčTranslating complexity into understanding

‚ÄčValuing the process of trying new tools to create value for yourself and others

‚ÄčThose are the skills you want to strengthen because your babies are watching you. They will model YOU.

‚ÄčBecause You Chose to Be Brave at a Time When Most Stayed Scared
‚ÄčYou get to choose:

‚ÄčThe industry (or industries)

‚ÄčYour interests

‚ÄčThe problems you want to solve

‚ÄčDoing the best parts of work you enjoy

‚ÄčAnd increasingly, technology helps carry the parts you don't.

‚ÄčNot so you can work more.

‚ÄčBut so you can:

‚ÄčPlay with your kids more

‚ÄčCall the friends you're missing

‚ÄčDo more of what makes you feel like YOU

‚ÄčBuild something that's adaptable and belongs to you

‚ÄčCreate a future that isn't dependent on someone else's roadmap

‚ÄčYour Children Are Watching
‚ÄčWhether we like it or not, our children are watching how we respond to change.

‚ÄčTheir future depends on parents who are willing to:

‚ÄčAdapt

‚ÄčStay resilient

‚ÄčLead

‚ÄčNot from fear. Let fear push you.

‚ÄčAnd let possibility pull you.

‚ÄčWhat You'll Leave This Workshop With
‚ÄčA somatic reset for your body and nervous system so you can think clearly instead of react quickly

‚ÄčTwo prompts to help manage your kids' latest behavioral challenge and boost your Momfidence

‚ÄčA custom AI Agent that helps you think through future decisions, contrarily, clearly, & quickly

‚ÄčA fresh perspective on a scary topic

‚ÄčOne less choice to make because the answer becomes clear. YOU are the answer.

‚ÄčIt's time that you take ownership for yourself, become the lead on your family's future, and be the mom your kids are proud of.
‚ÄčWhat This Isn't
‚ÄčIt's not a tech class.

‚ÄčIt's not a sales presentation.

‚ÄčIt's not another productivity system.

‚ÄčWhat This Is
‚ÄčOne hour with a woman who wouldn't take no for an answer. She's a best friend, a sister, a mother, a daughter. She is a reflection of you and she's holding the ground to help you stop spinning, start thinking clearly, and take your next step toward a future that is more secure than your future has ever been.

‚ÄčYou remember what they said.

‚Äč"The future is feminine."
‚ÄčWell, the future is here now.

‚ÄčYou might as well meet it on purpose.

‚ÄčGet your $10 pass, your 60 minute class, and let's begin acting like the generation that has every lifetime worth of wisdom available to her now.

content.title: Her Reset Button: 60 Minutes to Yourself
content.description: a workshop for the mom who's hitting the decision fatigue wall and just needs a break. I'll hold your brain and you leave with (at least) one less decision to make.
content.transcript:
Have you tried unplugging and plugging yourself back in?

‚ÄčYou‚Äôve made a thousand choices before eating leftover dinner for lunch on Monday.

‚ÄčWhat to buy. Which model? How much?

‚ÄčWhat to cook. Pizza again? Kale tomorrow.

‚ÄčWhat to schedule. Hair can wait. Toes are a must. Summer camp next week.

‚ÄčWhat to ignore. Thank God for the new 'call screen' feature. Does it have to show how many?

‚ÄčWhat to worry about. Traffic? Friends? The check engine light.

‚ÄčWhat to learn. With what time? It's not 2020 anymore Todo.

‚ÄčWhat to do next. Date night? Yeah, right!? Garden? More like Gardyn. Probably, feed the cat.

‚ÄčOn top of having kids, every app, reel, feature, podcast, ‚Äúlife changing shot,‚ÄĚ and your husband asks you to make:

‚ÄčOne. More. Choice.

‚ÄčForgive me now.

‚ÄčBut I promise this isn‚Äôt a class.

‚ÄčIt doesn‚Äôt lead to a course.

‚ÄčThere‚Äôs no hype cycle.

‚ÄčNo sales presentation.

‚ÄčNo Q&A.

‚ÄčJust you, your laptop, a notebook + tea, and 60 minutes of guided time to yourself.

‚ÄčA chance to think a little less so you can accomplish a little more with what you already got.

‚ÄčLike AI.

‚ÄčCapable. Imperfect.

‚ÄčDone.

‚ÄčJust come breathe.

‚ÄčLeave with a quieter mind, a little more patience, and one less to-do in your head.

‚ÄčWhat You'll Leave With

‚ÄčThe Audit
Back to your factory settings. No more obligations for the sake of "should." You'll leave with a clear picture of what you actually need today, this week, and this season of life.

‚ÄčThe Somatic Reset
A guided practice to move from your "Not Another Choice" eye-roll to your "F*ck Yes" frequency. A reset for your body, mind, and nervous system you can return to whenever life feels too loud.

‚ÄčThe Missing Instructions
Two simple prompts to better understand your child's unique behaviors and support them with newfound Momfidence.

‚ÄčYour Custom Agent
The beginning of a brain outside your head. Part thinking partner, part decision assistant, all relief. A personalized AI guide that helps you clear mental clutter, organize priorities, and make decisions with ease.

‚ÄčThe Details:

‚ÄčWhen: Saturday, 8/1 at 12 PM

‚ÄčWhere: Virtual (GoogleMeet link provided upon registration)

‚ÄčInvestment: $10 (Beta price for this inaugural vibe check)

‚ÄčCome as you are: exhausted, skeptical, or with your hands in the air. I‚Äôll meet you there.
